sections.title: Fats

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. major staple-energy role globally because tests whether practical staple legitimacy can rescue rough carb behaviour. very versatile staple because broad use cases. does bring some vitamin C because not empty on micros.

sections.title: Cons
